author: archyworldyscom
title: The new leader of the British Conservative Party, after the crushing defeat in the British elections, the Conservative Party has chosen Kemi Badenoch as the new leader, becoming the first black woman in the country – kemi badenoch new leader of the British Conservative Party, first black woman to lead a British party –
text:
London: After being in power in Britain for 14 years, the Conservative Party is trying to regroup after suffering a crushing election defeat. It all started with a change in leadership. The Conservative Party elected <a href="https://www.archyworldys.com/uk-rishi-sunak-apologises-to-former-mps-after-election-defeat/" title="UK: Rishi Sunak Apologises to Former MPs After Election Defeat”> Kemi Badenoch as its new leader on Saturday. Badenoch defeated rival MP Robert Jenrick in a vote cast by around 100,000 members of the right-wing centrist party. She is the first black woman to lead a major British political party.
He will replace Rishi Sunak
Badenoch replaced Rishi Sunak, under whose leadership the Conservative Party suffered a crushing defeat in July. The Conservative Party lost more than 200 seats and was reduced to 121. This was the party’s worst defeat since 1832.
Seek to restore the party’s reputation after years of divisions, scandals and economic turmoil, expose flaws in Labor Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s policies on key issues including the economy and immigration, and return the Conservatives to power in the next election by 2029. the challenge of the new leader to try.
Sunak had resigned as leader of the opposition. Before that, Rishi Sunak resigned as leader of the opposition in the British parliament on Wednesday. He cited some memories of the Diwali festival and said that two years ago, during the festival of lights, he was appointed as the first Prime Minister of Indian origin. Sunak, 44, was interim leader of the Conservative Party until a new leader was elected following his defeat in July’s general election. Sunak said: “I became the leader of my party during Diwali and during this festival I will resign from my post.”
